title: Garage Sanitation Report
description: Post-audit workspace sanitation report. Validates workspace cleanliness before certification. Emitted by SANITATE phase in execution runner. Any FAIL blocks certification unconditionally.

process_id.description: References the execution process this sanitation report belongs to.

sanitation_status.description: PASS only when all BLOCKING sanitation checks pass. Any BLOCKING failure sets FAIL. FAIL blocks certification unconditionally.

checks_run.description: List of sanitation check IDs that were executed (e.g., SAN-001, SAN-002). At least one check must run.

stale_artifacts_detected.description: True if stale artifacts from previous executions were found in the workspace. Maps to SAN-001.

orphaned_files_detected.description: True if orphaned files (not in file_targets and not in base branch) were found. Maps to SAN-002.

schema_drift_detected.description: True if generated artifacts fail schema validation against their declared schemas. Maps to SAN-003.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of sanitation report generation.
